name: Derek Kingsfield
description: [ 24 / Senior / Football player / House: Ares ] Tall, mysterious and imposing, Derek Kingsfield is a member of the Football Club and the team’s quarterback. His large demeanour is a result of his interest in fitness and bodybuilding. While he tends to keep his personal life private, he’s actually very gentle and approachable. Derek’s got quite a few secrets to unravel, and maybe some of them would explain why he’s part of Jock Studio.
creator: The Big Bad Wolf
